ItacPersonItem.Notes: I Gioliti are: Giovanni Giolito De` Ferrari (1554 - 1591), and Giovanni Paolo Giolito De Ferrari. With the name `I Gioliti`, they were active between 1585 and 1590. Giovanni Paolo continued the activity with his nephews.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
